Dolphin Watching in Marbella, Estepona & Benalmádena

Feel the magic of seeing dolphins in the wild. An unforgettable adventure sailing through the crystal-clear waters of the Costa del Sol.

  1. Home
  2. Dolphin Watching

Encounters with Cetaceans at High Sea

2 Hours Bay of Benalmádena, Estepona & Marbella 4.9 (High Probability)

Experience the thrill of seeing cetaceans in their natural habitat while sailing through the clearest waters of the Mediterranean.

View Route Details

Discover the World of Cetaceans on the Costa del Sol

Embark on a unique expedition through the Alboran Sea, one of the best spots in Southern Spain for wild dolphin watching.

Aboard our vessels, we seek encounters with these intelligent animals, enjoying a privileged perspective of the Estepona, Marbella, and Malaga coastline. Our trips are designed to offer an educational and exciting experience for all ages.

Thanks to our strategic location and the expertise of our captains, we have a very high success rate in sightings, always respecting the approach protocol to ensure animal welfare and marine sustainability.

Trip Highlights

  • High probability of sightings
  • Eco-friendly approach protocols
  • One complimentary drink
  • Small groups (VIP experience)
  • Professional skipper
  • Swim stop (weather permitting)

Roadmap: The Dolphin Experience

01

Welcome and Boarding

Reception at the port (Estepona/Marbella). Safety briefing and setting sail for the Alboran Sea to start the search.

02

Active Cetacean Search

Search for bottlenose and common dolphin pods. Our team shares fascinating facts about the Costa del Sol's marine ecosystem while we watch them swim alongside the boat.

Galería de la Experiencia

Dolphin Watching FAQ

While they are wild animals and we respect their freedom, we have a very high success rate. Our Captains know the best spots where they usually play and feed.

Absolutely! It is a perfect family activity. Children love seeing dolphins in their natural habitat, and our boats are fully equipped with all necessary safety gear.

We follow strict conservation guidelines to avoid stressing the animals. We get close enough for great photos and viewing, but always maintaining a respectful distance.

Dolphins are active throughout the day, but morning trips often offer calmer seas, making it easier to spot their fins and movements from a distance.

To protect the dolphins and follow local regulations, swimming with them is not allowed. However, watching them jump and swim near the boat is an unforgettable experience.

Dolphin Watching Rates

Wildlife Observation Trip

Join us on a unique adventure to spot dolphins in their natural habitat. A perfect experience for families and nature lovers in Benalmádena.

60€ / person

Duration: Approximately 2 hours.
Includes: Certified Captain, fuel, professional spotting, and a drink.

Reserve My Spot
